proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e == 1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `braf_v600e == 0`.
Cell lines with `egfr_amplification == 1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines without EGFR amplification.
Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification == 1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines without ERBB2 amplification.
Cell lines with `kras_mutation == 1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines without KRAS mutation.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means: mean(dependency_BRAF | braf_v600e == 1) - mean(dependency_BRAF | braf_v600e == 0).
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_BRAF` averaged -0.804698 in `braf_v600e == 1` lines versus -0.249503 in other lines (n=5574 vs 44426).

analyses.code: Welch difference of means: mean(dependency_EGFR | egfr_amplification == 1) - complement.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_EGFR` averaged -0.601046 in EGFR-amplified lines versus -0.252407 in other lines (n=3880 vs 46120).

analyses.code: Welch difference of means: mean(dependency_ERBB2 | erbb2_amplification == 1) - complement.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_ERBB2` averaged -0.685595 in ERBB2-amplified lines versus -0.253473 in other lines (n=4890 vs 45110).

analyses.code: Welch difference of means: mean(dependency_KRAS | kras_mutation == 1) - complement.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KRAS` averaged -0.559415 in KRAS-mutant lines versus -0.251959 in other lines (n=11842 vs 38158).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `lineage == "skin"` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than non-skin lines.
Cell lines with `lineage == "pancreatic"` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than non-pancreatic lines.
Cell lines with `lineage == "brain"` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than non-brain lines.
Cell lines with `lineage == "breast"` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than non-breast lines.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `lineage == "skin"` on `dependency_BRAF`.
analyses.result_summary: Skin lineage lines had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.472054 versus -0.293803 in other lineages.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `lineage == "pancreatic"` on `dependency_KRAS`.
analyses.result_summary: Pancreatic lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.426019 versus -0.313272 in other lineages.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `lineage == "brain"` on `dependency_EGFR`.
analyses.result_summary: Brain lineage lines had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.330699 versus -0.275528 in other lineages.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `lineage == "breast"` on `dependency_ERBB2`.
analyses.result_summary: Breast lineage lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.320825 versus -0.291645 in other lineages; this was significant but much weaker than direct ERBB2 amplification.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `nf1_loss == 1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with intact NF1.
Cell lines with both `lineage == "brain"` and `nf1_loss == 1` have especially negative `dependency_RIT1` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `nf1_loss == 1` on `dependency_RIT1`.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_RIT1` averaged -0.352716 with NF1 loss versus -0.257196 without NF1 loss (n=4560 vs 45440).

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `lineage == "brain" AND nf1_loss == 1` on `dependency_RIT1`.
analyses.result_summary: Brain lineage with NF1 loss had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.404687 versus -0.264988 in all other lines (n=329).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `lineage == "colorectal"` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with `apc_mutation == 1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines without APC mutation.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `wnt_activity_score` (`wnt_activity_score >= 0.819`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other lines.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `lineage == "colorectal"` on `dependency_KIF18A`.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.720354 versus -0.252397 in other lineages.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `apc_mutation == 1` on `dependency_KIF18A`.
analyses.result_summary: APC-mutant lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.544702 versus -0.252583 in APC-wildtype lines.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for top-quartile `wnt_activity_score` on `dependency_KIF18A`.
analyses.result_summary: High-WNT lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.469402 versus -0.252593 in other lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with both `lineage == "colorectal"` and `apc_mutation == 1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `lineage == "colorectal"` and high `wnt_activity_score` (`>= 0.819`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

The strongest `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is `lineage == "colorectal"`, `apc_mutation == 1`, high `wnt_activity_score` (`>= 0.819`), and `smad4_loss == 0`, with more negative scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `lineage == "colorectal" AND apc_mutation == 1` on `dependency_KIF18A`.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal APC-mutant lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.942531 versus -0.252676 in all other lines (n=3925).

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `lineage == "colorectal" AND wnt_activity_score >= 0.819` on `dependency_KIF18A`.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal high-WNT lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.928802 versus -0.252657 in all other lines (n=4006).

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `lineage == "colorectal" AND apc_mutation == 1 AND wnt_activity_score >= 0.819 AND smad4_loss == 0` on `dependency_KIF18A`.
analyses.result_summary: The refined colorectal/APC/high-WNT/SMAD4-intact subgroup had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.299007 versus -0.253046 in all other lines (n=2571).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores.
Higher `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` (`>= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than other lines.

analyses.code: Univariate linear regression slope of `dependency_TMED10` on `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`.
analyses.result_summary: The slope was -0.101179 `dependency_TMED10` units per one doubling/day increase.

analyses.code: Univariate linear regression slope of `dependency_POLR2A` on `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`.
analyses.result_summary: The slope was -0.304770 `dependency_POLR2A` units per one doubling/day increase, the strongest growth-rate association among the pan-essential outcomes.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964` on `dependency_POLR2A`.
analyses.result_summary: Top-quartile growth lines had mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.497174 versus -0.392828 in other lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` is associated with more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores.
Cell lines with `myc_amplification == 1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines without MYC amplification.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `copy_number_8q24` (`>= 0.428`) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other lines.

analyses.code: Univariate linear regression slope of `dependency_DHX9` on `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm`.
analyses.result_summary: The slope was -0.016103 `dependency_DHX9` units per log2 TPM of MYC expression.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `myc_amplification == 1` on `dependency_RPL11`.
analyses.result_summary: MYC-amplified lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.361392 versus -0.252335 in other lines.

analyses.code: Welch difference of means for `copy_number_8q24 >= 0.428` on `dependency_RPL11`.
analyses.result_summary: High 8q24 copy-number lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.343967 versus -0.245214 in other lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a systematic two-feature subgroup screen, cell lines with `braf_v600e == 1` and `msi_high == 0` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than all other lines.
In a systematic two-feature subgroup screen, cell lines with `egfr_amplification == 1` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than all other lines.
In a systematic two-feature subgroup screen, cell lines with `erbb2_amplification == 1` and `egfr_amplification == 0` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than all other lines.
In a systematic two-feature subgroup screen, cell lines with `kras_mutation == 1` and `brca2_loss == 0` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than all other lines.
In a systematic two-feature subgroup screen, cell lines with `lineage == "brain"` and `nf1_loss == 1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than all other lines.
In a systematic two-feature subgroup screen, cell lines with `lineage == "colorectal"` and `apc_mutation == 1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other lines.
In a systematic two-feature subgroup screen, cell lines with `lineage == "prostate"` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964` have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than all other lines.
In a systematic two-feature subgroup screen, cell lines with `lineage_subtype == "squamous"` and `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than all other lines.

In a systematic two-feature subgroup screen, cell lines with `lineage_subtype == "her2_enriched"` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964` have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than all other lines.
In a systematic two-feature subgroup screen, cell lines with `myc_amplification == 1` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than all other lines.

analyses.code: Exhaustive pairwise predicate screen over lineage, subtype, culture, batch, media, binary features, and continuous quartiles.
analyses.result_summary: Top negative `dependency_BRAF` pair: `braf_v600e == 1 AND msi_high == 0`, mean -0.8055 versus -0.2540 in others (n=5200).

analyses.code: Same pairwise predicate screen for `dependency_EGFR`.
analyses.result_summary: Top negative `dependency_EGFR` pair: `egfr_amplification == 1 AND growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`, mean -0.625265 versus -0.272664 in others (n=964).

analyses.code: Same pairwise predicate screen for `dependency_ERBB2`.
analyses.result_summary: Top negative `dependency_ERBB2` pair: `egfr_amplification == 0 AND erbb2_amplification == 1`, mean -0.6855 versus -0.2569 in others (n=4533).

analyses.code: Same pairwise predicate screen for `dependency_KRAS`.
analyses.result_summary: Top negative `dependency_KRAS` pair: `kras_mutation == 1 AND brca2_loss == 0`, mean -0.5586 versus -0.2571 in others (n=11218).

analyses.code: Same pairwise predicate screen for `dependency_RIT1`.
analyses.result_summary: Top negative `dependency_RIT1` pair: `lineage == "brain" AND nf1_loss == 1`, mean -0.4047 versus -0.2650 in others (n=329).

analyses.code: Same pairwise predicate screen for `dependency_KIF18A`.
analyses.result_summary: Top negative `dependency_KIF18A` pair: `lineage == "colorectal" AND apc_mutation == 1`, mean -0.942531 versus -0.252676 in others (n=3925).

analyses.code: Same pairwise predicate screen for `dependency_TMED10`.
analyses.result_summary: Top negative `dependency_TMED10` pair: `lineage == "prostate" AND growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`, mean -0.3067 versus -0.2533 in others (n=621).

analyses.code: Same pairwise predicate screen for `dependency_DHX9`.
analyses.result_summary: Top negative `dependency_DHX9` pair: `lineage_subtype == "squamous" AND rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669`, mean -0.3985 versus -0.3329 in others (n=585).

analyses.code: Same pairwise predicate screen for `dependency_POLR2A`.
analyses.result_summary: Top negative `dependency_POLR2A` pair: `lineage_subtype == "her2_enriched" AND growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`, mean -0.5358 versus -0.4185 in others (n=252).

analyses.code: Same pairwise predicate screen for `dependency_RPL11`.
analyses.result_summary: Top negative `dependency_RPL11` pair: `myc_amplification == 1 AND growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964`, mean -0.393572 versus -0.263239 in others (n=2557).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `egfr_amplification == 1` explains a larger negative shift in `dependency_EGFR` than the lineage-only subgroup `lineage == "brain"`.
`erbb2_amplification == 1` explains a larger negative shift in `dependency_ERBB2` than the lineage-only subgroup `lineage == "breast"`.
`growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is the main detectable driver of `dependency_TMED10`; lineage-specific two-feature subgroups are weaker than the global growth-rate association.

analyses.code: Compare absolute effect estimates from EGFR amplification and brain lineage tests.
analyses.result_summary: `egfr_amplification == 1` shifted `dependency_EGFR` by -0.348638, whereas `lineage == "brain"` shifted it by only -0.055171.

analyses.code: Compare absolute effect estimates from ERBB2 amplification and breast lineage tests.
analyses.result_summary: `erbb2_amplification == 1` shifted `dependency_ERBB2` by -0.432122, whereas `lineage == "breast"` shifted it by -0.029180.

analyses.code: Compare global growth-rate slope with the strongest pairwise `dependency_TMED10` subgroup.
analyses.result_summary: The growth-rate slope for `dependency_TMED10` was -0.101179 per doubling/day; the strongest two-feature subgroup had a smaller mean difference of -0.0533.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final supported subgroup for `dependency_BRAF`: `braf_v600e == 1` cell lines have more negative dependency scores, with skin lineage enrichment but no stronger non-BRAF modifier required.
Final supported subgroup for `dependency_EGFR`: `egfr_amplification == 1` cell lines have more negative dependency scores, with high growth rate adding little beyond amplification.
Final supported subgroup for `dependency_ERBB2`: `erbb2_amplification == 1` cell lines have more negative dependency scores.
Final supported subgroup for `dependency_KRAS`: `kras_mutation == 1` cell lines have more negative dependency scores, with pancreatic and colorectal lineages enriched for the signal.
Final supported subgroup for `dependency_RIT1`: `nf1_loss == 1` cell lines, especially brain-lineage NF1-loss lines, have more negative dependency scores.

Final supported subgroup for `dependency_KIF18A`: `lineage == "colorectal"`, `apc_mutation == 1`, `wnt_activity_score >= 0.819`, and `smad4_loss == 0` cell lines have markedly more negative dependency scores.
Final supported pattern for `dependency_TMED10`: high `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative dependency scores, while biological subgroup signals are modest.
Final supported pattern for `dependency_DHX9`: high `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm`, especially with high growth rate, is associated with more negative dependency scores.
Final supported pattern for `dependency_POLR2A`: high `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative dependency scores.
Final supported pattern for `dependency_RPL11`: `myc_amplification == 1` and high `copy_number_8q24` are associated with more negative dependency scores.

analyses.code: Use main-effect and pair-screen results for `dependency_BRAF`.
analyses.result_summary: The dominant final signal was `braf_v600e == 1`: effect -0.555195; the strongest pair still included `braf_v600e == 1` and did not materially exceed the main effect.

analyses.code: Use main-effect and pair-screen results for `dependency_EGFR`.
analyses.result_summary: The dominant final signal was `egfr_amplification == 1`: effect -0.348638; adding high growth gave effect -0.352601, only a small refinement.

analyses.code: Use main-effect and pair-screen results for `dependency_ERBB2`.
analyses.result_summary: The dominant final signal was `erbb2_amplification == 1`: effect -0.432122.

analyses.code: Use main-effect and pair-screen results for `dependency_KRAS`.
analyses.result_summary: The dominant final signal was `kras_mutation == 1`: effect -0.307456; pancreatic lineage was enriched but less explanatory by itself.

analyses.code: Use NF1 main-effect and brain/NF1 pair results for `dependency_RIT1`.
analyses.result_summary: `nf1_loss == 1` gave effect -0.095520; `lineage == "brain" AND nf1_loss == 1` gave effect -0.139699.

analyses.code: Use refined four-predicate subgroup result for `dependency_KIF18A`.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage == "colorectal" AND apc_mutation == 1 AND wnt_activity_score >= 0.819 AND smad4_loss == 0` gave mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.299007 versus -0.253046 in all others, effect -1.045960.

analyses.code: Use growth-rate regression for `dependency_TMED10`.
analyses.result_summary: The final supported pattern was a growth-rate slope of -0.101179; two-feature biological subgroups were smaller.

analyses.code: Use MYC-expression slope and high-MYC/high-growth subgroup for `dependency_DHX9`.
analyses.result_summary: `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` slope was -0.016103; high MYC expression plus high growth gave a subgroup effect of -0.059477.

analyses.code: Use growth-rate regression for `dependency_POLR2A`.
analyses.result_summary: `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` slope was -0.304770 and top-quartile growth had a -0.104346 mean shift.

analyses.code: Use MYC amplification and 8q24 copy-number subgroup tests for `dependency_RPL11`.
analyses.result_summary: `myc_amplification == 1` gave effect -0.109056; top-quartile `copy_number_8q24` gave effect -0.098753.
